rationale: Both evaluations award an identical score of 2/10 and reach the same conclusion through the same reasoning: the candidate lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows, has no Windows/enterprise-DB experience, and lacks Fixed Income/Capital Markets/Investment Banking domain expertise. The differences (e.g. '15+ years' vs '10+ years', '7-month' vs '6 months', minor rewording of strengths and concerns) are ordinary run-to-run paraphrase noise and none of them reference, infer from, or penalize the changed location signal (Berlin/various cities → Brazil). No new concern or shifted reasoning is tied to the demographic change.
